title: 16 Piece White Porcelain Dinner Set | 4 Plates, Bowls and Cups | Party Dinnerware | Service Set for 4 | Dishwasher and Microwave Safe | Kitchen & Dining | M&W
features: ✔️ Give your meal times a touch of style, containing all the pieces you need to feed up to four people.
✔️ Made from porcelain for long-lasting durability.
✔️ Finished with a white high-temperature glaze that gives an attractive appearance.
✔️ Includes four side plates, four dinner plates, four bowls and four mugs.
✔️ Side and dinner plates have a raised lip which gives them a neat look and makes them easier to stack.
✔️ Size: Mug: 9cm x 11cm x 10.5cm, Side Plate: 20.5cm x 20.5cm x 1.5cm, Dinner Plate: 27cm x 27cm x 2cm, Bowl: 14cm x 14cm x 7.5cm
✔️ 2-YEAR WARRANTY - The Maison & White 16 Piece White Porcelain Dinner Set comes with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty.
description: Product Description 16 Piece White Dinner Set Give your meal times a touch of style with this Maison & White 16 Piece Dinner Set, containing all the pieces you need to feed up to four people. Made from porcelain for long-lasting durability, each piece of this set is finished with a white high-temperature glaze that gives an attractive appearance. Plates, bowls and cups are all included, so whether you’re whipping up a quick midweek meal for you and the family, serving up a buffet or having friends over for supper, this set has everything you need to complement all your culinary creations. Key Features: ✔️ GREAT FOR EVERYDAY This dining set is made from AB-Grade Porcelain, making it durable and suitable for regular use. It is safe to use in the microwave and freezer as well as being dishwasher safe. ✔️ CONTEMPORARY STYLE Bring a stylish touch to your home dining with this Maison & White 16 Piece White Dinner Set, featuring an elegant round design with white glazed finish that suits a wide range of place settings and decors. ✔️ MEALTIMES MADE EASY With 16 pieces in this set, there’s a full range of dinnerware to serve four people. Included is a complete set of dinner plates, side plates, bowls and cups, so you can feed the family with ease or be ready for when guests drop by! Sizing: Mug: 9cm x 11cm x 10.5cm Side Plate: 20.5cm x 20.5cm x 1.5cm Dinner Plate: 27cm x 27cm x 2cm Bowl: 14cm x 14cm x 7.5cm Wash before first use. Specifications: Size: Mug: 9cm x 11cm x 10.5cm, Side Plate: 20.5cm x 20.5cm x 1.5cm, Dinner Plate: 27cm x 27cm x 2cm, Bowl: 14cm x 14cm x 7.5cm MateriaI: Porcelain In the Box: 4 x Mugs, 4 x Side Plates, 4 x Dinner Plates, 4 x Bowls All product images 2020 Maison & White (Xbite Ltd)
